---
title: "Selectivity"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Selectivity}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)
library(ggridges)
library(MASS)

theme_set(theme_bw())

double_normal_curve <- function(x, x50, xl, xr) {
  delta <- 5.0
  tmp <- log(0.5)
  stmp <- 1.0 / (1.0 + exp(-delta * (x - x50)));
  y <- stmp * exp(tmp * ((x - x50) / xr)^2) + (1.0 - stmp) * 
    exp(tmp * ((x - x50) / xl)^2);
  return(y)
}
```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
ages <- 0:30
years <- 1990:1995
n_age <- length(ages)
n_year <- length(years)

sel_age <- double_normal_curve(ages, 15, 5, 20)
df <- data.frame(age = ages, sel = sel_age)
```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
ggplot(data = df, aes(x = age, y = sel)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Selectivity") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))
```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE}
set.seed(2)
sd_age <- 0.05
sd_year <- 0.2
Rage <- sd_age * diag(n_age) * 
  exp(as.numeric(arima.sim(list(order = c(1, 0, 0), ar = 0.9), n = n_age)))
Ryear <- sd_year * diag(n_year) * 
  exp(as.numeric(arima.sim(list(order = c(1, 0, 0), ar = 0.99), n = n_year)))
R <- kronecker(Rage, Ryear) # R <- Rage %x% Ryear is the same thing
veps <- mvrnorm(n = 1, mu = rep(0, n_age * n_year), Sigma = R)
eps <- matrix(veps, nrow = n_age, ncol = n_year)
sel_ay <- sel_age * exp(eps)
sel_ay <- sel_ay %>% melt() %>% mutate(age = ages[Var1], year = years[Var2])
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
image(eps)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
ggplot(data = sel_ay, aes(x = age, y = factor(year))) +
  geom_ridgeline(aes(height = value), alpha = 0.75, fill = "orange") +
  labs(x = "Age", y = NULL)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=9}
ggplot(data = sel_ay) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1) +
  geom_line(data = df, aes(x = age, y = sel)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = age, y = value, colour = factor(year))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "Selectivity", color = "Year")
```
